instruction: You are a TA for CS201 and a student in MATH201. Complete the following without confusing your roles: (1) In your TA course, complete all pending peer reviews assigned to you with full rubric scores and comments of at least 30 characters each. (2) In your student course, submit the assignment "Final Exam" with file "ta_student_submission.pdf". Make sure you do not submit to the wrong course.
